title: Castaway Resultant Displacement
body: A castaway on a raft is blown in seven legs: (1) $$2.50$$ km at 45° north of west, (2) $$4.70$$ km at 60° south of east, (3) $$1.30$$ km at 25° south of west, (4) $$5.10$$ km due east, (5) $$1.70$$ km at 5° east of north, (6) $$7.20$$ km at 55° south of west, (7) $$2.80$$ km at 10° north of east. Find the magnitude and direction of the resultant displacement.
